description: CompositionPurple printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has a modified bateau keyhole neckline with purple tape detailing, short sleeves with inner hem tape and split side hemsFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang in the form of this printed black and white kurta from w!
